# Production Configuration Guide

This guide covers production-specific configuration for the Discord-like application.

## Table of Contents

- [Production Checklist](#production-checklist)
- [Security Configuration](#security-configuration)
- [Performance Tuning](#performance-tuning)
- [High Availability](#high-availability)
- [Backup and Recovery](#backup-and-recovery)
- [Compliance](#compliance)

## Production Checklist

### Pre-Deployment Checklist

- [ ] Generate secure secrets (JWT, encryption)
- [ ] Configure production database credentials
- [ ] Set up SSL/TLS certificates
- [ ] Configure firewall rules
- [ ] Set up monitoring and alerts
- [ ] Configure log aggregation
- [ ] Implement backup strategy
- [ ] Test disaster recovery procedures
- [ ] Configure rate limiting
- [ ] Set up load balancing
- [ ] Review and audit permissions
- [ ] Disable debug mode
- [ ] Configure CORS for production domains
- [ ] Test failover procedures

## Security Configuration

### JWT Secrets

Generate secure JWT signing keys:

```bash
# Generate 256-bit secret for access tokens
openssl rand -base64 32

# Example output: : 3.0.0

# Enable CORS
web.cors:
  allowed-origins: https://api.example.com,https://www.example.com
  allowed-methods: GET,POST,PATCH,DELETE
  allowed-headers: Authorization,Content-Type
  exposed-headers: Authorization
  max-age: 3600

# Disable debug endpoints
management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      exposure:
        exclude: heapdump,threaddump,env,configprops
```

## Performance Tuning

### JVM Heap Configuration

Production-optimized JVM settings:

```yaml
# In docker-compose.yml
environment:
  - JAVA_OPTS=-Xmx2g -Xms2g -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=200 -XX:+PrintGCDetails -XX:+PrintGCTimeStamps -XX:+UseStringDeduplication -XX:+OptimizeStringConcat -XX:+UseCompressedOops -XX:+HeapDumpOnOutOfMemoryError -XX:HeapDumpPath=/tmp/ -Djavax.net.ssl.trustStore=/etc/ssl/certs/java/cacerts
```

### Connection Pool Tuning

Optimize database and Redis connection pools:

```yaml
spring:
  datasource:
    hikari:
      maximum-pool-size: 50
      minimum-idle: 10
      connection-timeout: 30000
      idle-timeout: 600000
      max-lifetime: 1800000
      leak-detection-threshold: 60000
      connection-test-query: SELECT 1

  data:
    redis:
      lettuce:
        pool:
          max-active: 16
          max-idle: 8
          min-idle: 2
          max-wait: 3000ms
```

### Caching Strategy

Optimize cache configuration:

```yaml
spring:
  cache:
    redis:
      time-to-live: 1800000  # 30 minutes
      cache-null-values: false
      use-key-prefix: true
      key-prefix: "prod:"
```

### Async Configuration

Optimize async processing:

```yaml
spring:
  task:
    execution:
      pool:
        core-size: 8
        max-size: 16
        queue-capacity: 100
        keep-alive: 60s
        allow-core-thread-timeout: 60s
        thread-name-prefix: discord-like-async-
```

## High Availability

### Horizontal Scaling

Configure for horizontal scaling:

```yaml
# docker-compose.prod.yml
discord-like:
  deploy:
    replicas: 3
    resources:
      limits:
        cpus: '2.0'
        memory: 2G
      reservations:
        cpus: '1.0'
        memory: 1G
    update_config:
      parallelism: 1
      delay: 10s
      failure_action: rollback
      order: start-first
```

### Load Balancer Configuration

Configure nginx load balancer:

```nginx
# nginx.conf
upstream discord_like {
    least_conn;
    server app1:8000;
    server app2:8000;
    server app3:8000;
}

server {
    listen 443 ssl;
    server_name api.example.com;
    
    ssl_certificate /etc/nginx/ssl/api.example.com.crt;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/nginx/ssl/api.example.com.key;
    
    location / {
        proxy_pass http://discord_like;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
        
        # WebSocket support
        proxy_http_version 1.1;
        proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header Connection $connection_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Host $host;
        
        if ($http_upgrade = "websocket") {
            proxy_pass http://discord_like;
        }
    }
}
```

### Database Replication

Set up PostgreSQL streaming replication:

```bash
# Configure PostgreSQL master
# postgresql.conf
wal_level = replica
max_wal_senders = 3
max_replication_slots = 5
hot_standby = on
```

### Kafka Replication

Configure Kafka with replication factor > 1:

```yaml
# In docker-compose.yml
kafka:
  environment:
    KAFKA_DEFAULT_REPLICATION_FACTOR: 3
    KAFKA_OFFSETS_TOPIC_REPLICATION_FACTOR: 3
    KAFKA_NUM_PARTITIONS: 6
```

## Backup and Recovery

### Automated Backup Strategy

```bash
#!/bin/bash
# backup.sh
BACKUP_DIR="/backups/discord-like"
DATE=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)

# Database backup
docker-compose exec -T postgres pg_dump -U postgres -d discord_like | gzip > $BACKUP_DIR/db_$DATE.sql.gz

# Redis backup
docker-compose exec -T redis redis-cli --rdb /dev/stdout | gzip > $BACKUP_DIR/redis_$DATE.rdb.gz

# Keep last 30 days
find $BACKUP_DIR -name "*.gz" -mtime +30 -delete

# Upload to S3 (if configured)
aws s3 sync $BACKUP_DIR s3://discord-like-backups/
```

### Disaster Recovery

Recovery procedures:

```bash
#!/bin/bash
# restore.sh
BACKUP_FILE=$1

# Stop application
docker-compose down

# Restore database
gunzip -c $BACKUP_FILE | docker-compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d discord_like

# Restore Redis
gunzip -c $BACKUP_FILE | docker-compose exec -T redis redis-cli --pipe

# Start application
docker-compose up -d
```

### Point-in-Time Recovery (PITR)

Configure PostgreSQL for point-in-time recovery:

```sql
-- postgresql.conf
wal_level = replica
archive_mode = on
archive_command = 'cp %p /var/lib/postgresql/archive/%f'
restore_command = 'cp /var/lib/postgresql/archive/%f %p'
recovery_target_timeline = '2024-01-01 12:00:00'
```

## Compliance

### GDPR Compliance

Data handling requirements:

```yaml
# Add to SecurityConfig.java
@Configuration
public class GDPRComplianceConfig {
    @Bean
    public DataRetentionPolicy dataRetentionPolicy() {
        return new DataRetentionPolicy()
            .retentionDays(365)  # 1 year
            .anonymizeDeletedData(true)
            .allowDataExport(true)
            .allowDataDeletion(true);
    }
}
```

### Audit Logging

Configure audit logging:

```yaml
# application.yaml
logging:
  level:
    audit:
      com.luishbarros.discord_like: INFO
    security: DEBUG
  audit:
    enabled: true
    include:
      - type
      - userId
      - roomId
      - action
      - result
      - timestamp
      - ipAddress
```

### Security Headers

Add security headers:

```yaml
# In application.yaml
server:
  compression:
    enabled: true
    servlet:
      encoding:
        charset: UTF-8
        force: true
  http2:
    enabled: true

# In SecurityConfig.java
@Configuration
public class SecurityHeaderConfig {
    @Bean
    public WebSecurityCustomizer webSecurityCustomizer() {
        return (web) -> {
            web.headers()
              .contentSecurityPolicyHeaders(headers -> headers
                      .addStrictTransportSecurity()
                      .addXContentTypeOptionsHeader())
              .and()
              .xssProtection()
              .csrf();
        };
    }
}
```

## Monitoring Integration

### Health Checks

Production health check endpoints:

```yaml
# application.yaml
management:
  health:
    livenessState:
      enabled: true
    readinessState:
      enabled: true
  endpoints:
    web:
      exposure:
        include: health,info,metrics,prometheus
        exclude: heapdump,threaddump,env,configprops
```

### Distributed Tracing

Configure Zipkin integration:

```yaml
# In application.yaml
spring:
  zipkin:
    base-url: http://zipkin:9411
    sender:
      type: kafka
      kafka:
        topic: zipkin
```
